name: 3IN1
description: A comprehensive sports insights, media streaming, and tracking application built with Flutter, featuring high-performance data visualization and a user-friendly interface.
features: Live Match tracking with detailed team statistics and dynamic charts.
Comprehensive league standings and tournament structure visualization.
Unified media streaming player with custom playback controls.
Instant real-time updates and push notification delivery.
my_role: Mobile Team Lead - Integrated and normalized data from multiple complex APIs into a unified architecture, combining responses from different services to provide users with accurate and near real-time sports insights despite inconsistencies between data providers.
